headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Northern Trust, Raises Price Target to $170
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Vivek Juneja   maintains Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $153.5 to $170.
